latestEntry.notes: Week 6 Day 2 of Talk 4 (Week 2 of 2). Mental Models focus: Extracting and mastering Munger's core mental models from the 5 notions. Core frameworks: Five Notions of Practical Thought, Lollapalooza Effect, Man with a Hammer Syndrome, Inversion, Incentive-Caused Bias. 5 case snapshots - New Coke fiasco, social media engagement engines, job offer trap, Berkshire Coca-Cola investment, startup founder failure. Key takeaway: Build a 5-Notions Checklist, audit your hammer collection, practice inversion. Commitment: Apply all 5 notions to one upcoming decision. Message delivered successfully.
